SEARCH

All Packages

Package Summary
Package
Description
client.app
Client-side application navigation and session support for the GoNature desktop client.
client.boundary
JavaFX client application entry points and top-level boundary classes.
client.net
Client networking infrastructure for communicating with the GoNature server over TCP/IP.
client.service
Client services that wrap network calls and expose higher-level operations to the UI.
client.view
JavaFX controllers and reusable widgets for the GoNature user interface.
common.dto
Serializable data-transfer objects, enums, requests, responses and events shared by client and server.
server.app
Server-side application entry points.
server.boundary
Server graphical boundary classes used to configure and operate the server.
server.control
Server controllers that implement the GoNature business use cases.
server.dao
Data-access objects that persist and load GoNature data from the relational database.
server.db
Database connection and environment-loading utilities.
server.net
Server TCP/IP networking, routing and client-session management.
server.scheduler
Background jobs that enforce reminder, timeout, no-show and waitlist rules.
server.subscription
Server-side publish/subscribe registry for realtime client updates.
